title: euphrasia alpina subsp. pulchra
intro: Euphrasia alpina subsp. pulchra, also known as the eye-bright or alpine eyebright, is a type of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated eyes, skin, and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Euphrasia alpina subsp. pulchra include its ability to reduce swelling and inflammation, relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and support immune function. Euphrasia alpina subsp. pulchra can be prepared into various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and eye drops, which can be used to address a range of health concerns.
